validation_dataset: NASA B0018 (REAL data — Saha & Goebel 2009, NASA Ames)

calibration.note: OCV fitted from dynamic discharge + IR-drop compensation; not quasi-static GITT — introduces ~27 mV OCV approximation error

honest_limitations: NMC811 DFN cartridge not applicable to Sanyo B0018 chemistry; EKF used instead
OCV fitted from dynamic discharge (not GITT): ~27 mV systematic OCV error
MAE ~100 mV reflects model-to-chemistry gap, not fundamental EKF limitation
